emails.subject: 6 more counterparties to move
emails.body: 6 more counterparties to move Please move the following six counterparties from NG-Price to Bankruptcy. Please move only financial deals. Please let me know when this is complete. We need to have it done by the time we calc our books today no exceptions. Thanks for your help. TAGG Short Name: TRANSWEST VITOL S.A. DUKEFSVCMAR ENCOREACQCOM ENERGYUSA ENTERGYKOCTRA Thanks again. PL
